item.title: Scattered Spider Hackers Plead Guilty on Day 1 of Trial 摘要
item.description:
Two members of the Scattered Spider cybercrime group, Thalha Jubair (20) and Owen Flowers (18), pleaded guilty in the UK to charges related to an August 2024 cyberattack on Transport for London. Flowers also admitted to hacking US healthcare providers. Jubair is wanted in the US for 120 network intrusions involving 47 entities, resulting in $115 million in ransom payments. He co-ran a Telegram channel for SIM-swapping and was involved in a 2022 SMS phishing campaign that compromised over 130 organizations, including LastPass and DoorDash. Sentencing is set for July 15, 2026.
标签: cybercrime, ransomware, Scattered Spider, phishing, SIM-swapping, Transport for London, guilty plea, UK, healthcare, critical infrastructure

item.title: The Talk Show: ‘Perp Walk for Selfies’ 摘要
item.description:
Jason Snell joins John Gruber on The Talk Show to discuss WWDC 2026 and preview their upcoming 50-episode Apple history podcast 'Designed in California'. The episode includes sponsor messages from Factor, Squarespace, and Finalist.
标签: podcast, Apple, WWDC, tech history, interview, sponsors, Daring Fireball, The Talk Show

item.title: OPFS + Pyodide test harness 摘要
item.description:
The author explores using the Origin Private File System (OPFS) to enable Datasette Lite, a Python application running in the browser via Pyodide and WebAssembly, to edit persistent SQLite files stored locally on the user's computer. A playground UI was built using Claude Code for web to test OPFS functionality across different browsers.
标签: OPFS, Pyodide, WebAssembly, Datasette Lite, SQLite, browsers, file system, Claude Code, playground
